dimensions.archetype_clarity: Archetype reads clearly on first frame

statuses.development: Profile exists; casting plate not locked — not cleared for hero production.
statuses.plate_locked: 3-view or hero plate locked; performance study not complete.
statuses.performance_review: Scene studies logged; scores being finalized by agency team.
statuses.agency_ready: Performance rubric passed; cleared for slate casting.
statuses.represented: Active on producer slate — priority representation.
